title: Revised POEA Rules and Regulations Governing the Recruitment and Employment of Landbased Overseas Filipino Workers of 2016
content: This document contains the rules and regulations set by the Philippine Overseas Employment Administration (POEA) governing the recruitment and employment of landbased Overseas Filipino Workers (OFWs). It outlines the standards, procedures, and requirements for recruitment agencies, employers, and OFWs to ensure the protection and welfare of Filipino workers abroad.
